name: Spinigun
description: Spiniguns are assault rifles built around a rotating Gatling barrel that needs time to spin up before the weapon reaches its true fire rate. They are at their best when you can hold the trigger through long bursts and keep the barrel at full speed, turning them into bullet hoses that overwhelm targets through sustained pressure. The price is heavy ammo consumption, so they shine most on builds that can keep the magazine and reserves flowing.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources. Because they use the Vladof Gatling barrel, they only appear at green rarity or higher. Their fire rate and magazine size can empty your rifle reserves in seconds. Vladof Spiniguns can roll the highest fire rate available on non-unique assault rifles.
